headlines.headline: Pleven Trading Co announces breakthrough in automated logistics

sentiment.reasoning: The announcement of a breakthrough in automated logistics suggests potential operational efficiency gains, though the lack of specific financial impact details warrants moderate uncertainty.

headlines.headline: Halvax Networks revises long-term strategy with focus on data analytics

headlines.headline: Halvax Networks loses key contract in Asia Pacific to competitor

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
